form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (23.63) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 13 length eighth. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the run to the first turn crowded for room and came together.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2 length second (23.03) over 401m at this track. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.
